# ADR 0112 — Mountains biome, MC 1.8's Extreme Hills

Status: Accepted (2026-07-15; Iker live-verified 2026-07-16). **Placement
superseded by ADR 0122** (2026-07-17): the mountain-mask zone field that
sited the ranges is deleted with the rest of the field model.

## Context

Fixture. The bold span wraps mid-phrase, exactly as in the real file — the
supersession word reaches column zero only by accident of wrapping.
